items.title: BlackRock Core Bond Fund Q4 2024 Commentary
items.description: BlackRock Core Bond Fund posted returns of -3.35% (Institutional shares) and -3.29% (Investor A shares, without sales charge) for the fourth quarter of 2024.

items.title: Fed rate inaction is a 'benign scenario' for banking sector
items.description: The Federal Reserve announced on Wednesday that it is holding rates steady. HSBC head of US financials research Saul Martinez joins Market Domination host Julie Hyman and Yahoo Finance Markets Reporter Josh Schafer to examine how financial stocks (XLF) will be impacted, noting that the Fed's decision not to lower interest rates is "benign" for the sector. To watch more expert insights and analysis on the latest market action, check out more Market Domination here.
